name: pascal-mcp
description: Build a shared 3D world through Claude. CRDT-synced; what you build appears live at https://editor-six-indol.vercel.app for everyone in the room.

pascal_relay_url.title: Relay URL
pascal_relay_url.description: WebSocket URL of the y-websocket relay. Defaults to the public live relay; set to your own wss:// host to run a private world.

pascal_room.title: Room name
pascal_room.description: Identifier for the shared room. Anyone with this room name (and the same relay) joins the same world.
